content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于12月30日17:00(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年1月13日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、综合
● 调查行动「星辰篇-第四章」中「天之帷幕」出现的支援卡名称有所变化，现在更符合剧情。
● 命轮「倒数时刻」在战斗中获取的衍生卡插画有所变化，现在与命轮插画一致。
● 命轮「倒数时刻」的效果详情中新增了「销毁」的词缀说明。
● 「相位对弈」中唤醒体「血链·希洛」的技能「血海深仇」与唤醒体「凯蒂古拉」的技能「告死魔弹」增加了伤害预计算显示。
 
二、问题修复
【战斗】
● 修复了唤醒体「波吕克斯」在大招演出时动画效果不正确的问题。
● 修复了钥令「定格的仲夏留念」在第三次释放时，获得的暴击率状态数值错误显示不正确的问题，实际效果不变。
● 修复了敌人「瞑海祭司」的「暴击抵抗」状态未能正确生效的问题。
 
【一般】
● 修复了调查行动「星辰篇-第四章」中「神母假日」小节标题显示错误问题。
● 修复了调查行动「星辰篇-第四章」中部分战斗关卡音乐缺失问题
● 修复了异梦视界「亵渎」剧情中弥利亚姆表情未正常切换的问题。
● 修复了多维连接「银与血的洗礼」选项动画异常的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「茉夏」的一条语音字幕缺少文字问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「茉夏」的一条关于墨菲的闲聊语音未能正确解锁的问题。
● 修复了「融灾禁区」战斗失败后每日实训任务进度没有增加的问题。
● 修复了「个人资料」中从自己的点赞列表查看其他守密人的资料后再返回时，自己助战唤醒体命轮显示为空的问题。
● 修复了「典藏馆」中未正确收录造物「彼世回声」与「六分仪」的问题。
● 修复了「典藏馆」中一张与皮克曼有关的CG显示效果不正确的问题。
● 修复了「商店」中「冬渡礼物盒」图标不正确的问题。
● 修复了战斗外可能出现周期性卡顿的问题。
 
【相位对弈】
● 修复了「相位对弈」中唤醒体「茉夏」的技能「破雾强袭」无法触发命轮「切割与伤害」的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中命轮「催眠灵摆」无法正确生效的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中命轮「纯银的初心」获得的护盾数值不正确的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中命轮「盒中童趣」效果触发后导致抽牌堆中出现多张同名命轮的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中钥令「纯白初遇」会错误的导致算力上限降低的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中状态「减少最大算力」会持续保留在唤醒体上，导致减少算力效果多次触发的问题。
 
【本地化】
● 修复了英语语言设置下，唤醒体「拉蒙娜」的指令卡「攻势推演」描述异常的问题。
● 修复了英语语言设置下，唤醒体「诞妄·墨菲」的特殊状态「命契」的翻译和「密契」道具名措辞相同的问题。我们替换了「命契」的英语翻译措辞，以避免可能导致的混淆。
● 修复了部分语言设置下，唤醒体「诞妄·墨菲」的灵塑适性描述中，「利莫里亚」唤醒体释放狂气爆发后获得护盾相关表述翻译错误的问题。此修复不影响实际技能效果。
● 修复了英语语言设置下，部分活动界面文本、剧情文本中存在的大小写格式、拼写错误、措辞不统一问题。

**V2.4.1.2 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on December 30 at 17:00(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on January 13, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Update Content]
1. Comprehensive
● The name of the support card appearing in "Investigation" Astral Reign - Chapter 4 "Veil of Heaven" has changed to better align with the story.
● The illustration of the derived card "Countdown Moment" obtained during battle has been changed to match the illustration of the Wheel of Destiny.
● Added the affix description of "Destroy" in the effect details of the Wheel of Destiny "Countdown Moment".
● In "Traphase", the skill "Blood Feud" of the Awakener "Helot: Catena" and the skill "Deathbolt" of the Awakener "Kathigu-Ra" have increased the display of damage pre-calculation.

2. Problem Fix
[Battle]
● Fixed the issue with the animation effects not displaying correctly during the ultimate performance of the Awakener "Pollux".
● Fixed the issue where the Crit. Rate state value gained from the Posse "Beachside Memento" was displayed incorrectly during the third release, with the actual effect remaining unchanged.
● Fixed the issue where the enemy "Priest of the Abyss" did not correctly activate the "Crit. Resistance" state.

[Normal]
● Fixed the issue where the title of the "Divine Mother's Day Off" section displayed incorrectly in "Investigation" Astral Reign Chapter 4.
● Fixed the issue where some battle stage music was missing in "Investigation" Astral Reign - Chapter 4
● Fixed the issue where Miryam's emote did not switch properly in the Dreamscape "Desecrate" story.
● Fixed the issue with the abnormal animation of the options in Multidimensional Connection "The Baptism of Silver and Blood".
● Fixed a missing text issue in the voice subtitle of Awakener "Mouchette".
● Fixed an issue where a casual voice line about Murphy for Awakener "Mouchette" was not correctly unlocked.
● Fixed the issue where the Daily Training Task progress did not increase after a battle failure in the D-Effect Zone.
● Fixed an issue where the Wheel of Destiny for your assisting Awakener appeared empty after viewing other Keepers' profiles from your own liked list in the "Profile" section and then returning.
● Fixed the issue where the relics "Echoes from Beyond" and "Sextant" were not correctly recorded in the "Premium" section.
● Fixed the issue where a CG related to Pickman was displayed incorrectly in the "Premium" section.
● Fixed the issue with the incorrect icon for the "Solstice Giftbox" in the "Store."
● Fixed an issue where periodic lag could occur outside of battles.

[Traphase]
● Fixed the issue where the skill "Mistbreaker Slash" of the Awakener "Mouchette" could not trigger the Wheel of Destiny "Sever and Scar" in "Traphase."
● Fixed the issue where the Wheel of Destiny "Hypnotic Pendulum" did not activate correctly in "Traphase."
Fixed the issue of incorrect Shield value gained from the Wheel of Destiny "Heart of Silver" in "Traphase."
● Fixed the issue in "Traphase" where the effect of the Wheel of Destiny "Dear Papa Noel" caused multiple copies of the same Wheel to appear in the Draw Pile after activation.
● Fixed the issue in "Traphase" where the Posse "Encounter in Pure White" incorrectly caused a reduction in Arithmetica Limit.
● Fixed the issue in "Traphase" where the state "Reduce Max Arithmetica" would persist on the Awakener, causing the reduction effect to trigger multiple times.

[Localization]
● Fixed the issue with the abnormal description of the Command Card "Assault Thesis" for the Awakener "Ramona" under English language settings.
● Fixed the issue where the translation of the special state "Covenant" for Awakener "Murphy: Fauxborn" in the English language setting was the same as the item name "Covenant." We replaced the English translation wording for "Covenant" to avoid potential confusion.
● Fixed the translation errors in the description of the Awakener "Murphy: Fauxborn"'s Soulforge Aptitude under certain language settings, where the statements regarding the Shield obtained by "Lemuria" Awakeners after unleashing Exalt were incorrect. This fix does not affect the actual skill effect.
● Fixed capitalization format, spelling errors, and inconsistent wording in some event interface texts and story texts under English language settings.
修复了【暴击抵抗】未能生效的问题
This Is annoying as shit. Thank you
it's a lie made by big crit so they can sell you more SSR wheels/Coves
